overall.description: First-person underwater exploration from a video game resembling Subnautica, swimming through a dark ocean biome illuminated by bioluminescent coral and flora. The sequence transitions from open water view to a diving helmet perspective with a red HUD visor border.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep ocean floor with bioluminescent coral clusters

agents.ego_description: swimming forward through dark open water toward glowing coral formations on the left

entered.detail: large cluster of cyan-teal glowing coral with branching structures
small patches of purple bioluminescent flora on the seabed
dark sandy ocean floor with scattered rocks

segments.scene_description: Swimming through dark underwater environment with limited visibility. A large bioluminescent coral formation glows cyan-teal on the left side while smaller purple glowing plants dot the right. The sandy ocean floor passes below as the camera moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep ocean floor viewed through diving helmet visor

events.description: diving helmet visor with red HUD border becomes visible, indicating player has equipped diving gear or entered a vehicle

agents.ego_description: continuing to swim forward while viewing the environment through a diving helmet visor with red-tinted HUD elements

entered.detail: red circular helmet frame with HUD border visible around the edges of the screen

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to a diving helmet view with a prominent red circular visor border. The camera continues swimming forward past the bioluminescent coral formation, which gradually recedes into the distance on the left. The purple seaplants become smaller as they fall behind, maintaining the deep ocean atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous underwater journey through a dark ocean biome that transitions from an open perspective into the constrained view of a diving helmet. It begins by swimming through deep water with limited visibility, gliding past a large, glowing cyan-teal coral formation on the left and scattered purple bioluminescent plants on the right. As the camera moves steadily forward over the sandy ocean floor, the perspective shifts to reveal a prominent red circular visor border framing the scene. The view then continues its forward momentum, causing the vibrant coral and purple seaplants to gradually recede into the distance while maintaining the oppressive atmosphere of the deep ocean.
